## Checklist

- [ ] All achievement IDs are unique (no conflicts with core or other packs)
- [ ] All referenced event types exist in the [Event Catalog](docs/creating-achievements.md#event-type-catalog)
- [ ] Pack file does NOT include `sets:` or `questlines:`
- [ ] All definitions have `icon`, `rarity`, `description`, and valid `conditions`
- [ ] I have tested the pack by dropping it into `~/.agent-achievements/packs/`
- [ ] `agpa pack list` shows my pack
- [ ] Verified with `agpa doctor` — no errors reported for my pack's achievements

## Screenshots (optional)

If you tested with the Dashboard, add screenshots showing your achievements in the grid.

## Notes

Any additional context, design decisions, or Easter eggs?
